subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that ye have been preserved from the sedition of the second 'Ubaydu'lláh. Thus hath it been ordained from the presence of One Who is the Mighty, the Powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله از فتنه عبیدالله ثانی محفوظ ماندید کذلک قدر من لدن مقتدر قدیر یا
